meaning: /[)n/n.绠＄悊,缁忚惀,琛匽缃戠粶绠＄悊
examples: Too much time is spent on administration.
He has a Master's in Business Administration.
I work in the Sales Administration department.
The Federal Transit Administration, an arm of the Department of Transportation, has even explicitly promoted SILOs.
Mortgage insurance from the Federal Housing Administration would make that kind of refinancing easier.
